title: carex stenophylla subsp. stenophylla
intro: Carex stenophylla subsp. stenophylla, also known as the slender-leaved sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is native to North America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as sore throats, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Carex stenophylla subsp. stenophylla can be prepared into teas, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
